changeSet.author: howners
changeSet.comment: Replace "le {{rental.endDate}}" with "{{rental.endDateClause}}" in default templates so leases without a fixed end date render a proper French clause ("à l'échéance convenue, par renouvellement tacite annuel") instead of "le Indéterminée".
changeSet.sql: UPDATE contract_templates SET content = REPLACE(content, 'le {{rental.endDate}}', '{{rental.endDateClause}}') WHERE content LIKE '%le {{rental.endDate}}%';

rollback.sql: UPDATE contract_templates SET content = REPLACE(content, '{{rental.endDateClause}}', 'le {{rental.endDate}}') WHERE content LIKE '%{{rental.endDateClause}}%';
